buildCommand: mkdir -p "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" && source ~/.cargo/env >/dev/null 2>&1 && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable CARGO_HOME="$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" anchor build
publicTestCommand: mkdir -p "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" && source ~/.cargo/env >/dev/null 2>&1 && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable CARGO_HOME="$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" anchor test --skip-build --run tests-public
hiddenTestCommand: mkdir -p "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" && source ~/.cargo/env >/dev/null 2>&1 && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable CARGO_HOME="$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" anchor test --skip-build --run tests-hidden
adversarialTestCommand: mkdir -p "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" && source ~/.cargo/env >/dev/null 2>&1 && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable CARGO_HOME="$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" anchor test --skip-build --run tests-adversarial
